hero.intro: A team of {count} AI agents that work together — and <feel>feel</feel> — to grow your business, your brand and your ideas.

team.title: The cacti, by division
team.subtitle: Each agent is hired separately, in a pack, or as a full subscription. Tap one to open it.

console.greeting: Hi, this is {name} {emoji} — {role}. {description} How can I help?

cactus-ia.description: The knowledge base, memory, brand kit, RAG and integrations that power every agent.

ramona.description: Your executive assistant. Takes the request, builds the brief, delegates to the agents and makes sure everything ships.

saguaro.description: Processes, SOPs, tasks, checklists, approvals and reminders. The operational board of the business.

agave.description: KPIs, forecast, pricing, margins, cashflow, dashboards and financial decisions.

tuna.description: Leads, pipeline, funnels, follow-up, closing and sales reports.

pita.description: Decks, visual proposals, meeting notes and a per-client feedback vault.

biznaga.description: Market research, competitors, trends, benchmarking and external pricing.

ferocactus.description: Quotes, base contracts, terms, agreements and service orders.

nopal.description: Grids, captions, calendars, community management, viral formats and publishing.

cholla.description: Launches and optimizes paid media (Meta, Google, LinkedIn, TikTok Ads): budget, ROAS, A/B and continuous optimization.

pitaya.description: Storytelling, ads, scripts, emails, landing pages, slogans and campaign concepts.

cardon.description: Branding, layouts, carousels, banners, flyers, packaging and ad creatives.

lente.description: Photo direction, shotlists, moodboards, product and e-commerce with avatars or models.

peyote.description: The core idea. Defines the emotional angle of every campaign, audits the pieces and leads the creative team.

candelabro.description: Reels, commercials, TikToks, corporate videos and storyboards. Uses scripts from Pitaya and photos from Lente.

sanpedro.description: Motion graphics, animated logos, transitions, characters, intros and micro-animations.

garambullo.description: Voiceover, podcasts, dubbing, audiobooks and brand sonic identity.

pereskia.description: Jingles, music, sound design, ambiance and audio branding. Delivers tracks to Candelabro.

ariocarpus.description: Creates avatars, virtual influencers, sellers, presenters and brand ambassadors with a consistent face, voice and story.

astrophytum.description: Mascots, characters, brand universes, stylized avatars and consistent story bibles.

opuntia.description: Web builder: landings, sites, funnels, microsites, forms, blogs and e-commerce.

echinocereus.description: Technical SEO, keywords, content, metadata, web architecture, interlinking and organic traffic.

maguey.description: Scripts, follow-up, objections, prospecting, proposals, quotes and closing deals.

cereus.description: Fashion, drops, collections, catalog, product, e-commerce and merchandising. The emotional atelier.

aloe.description: WhatsApp, email, DMs, comments, tickets, FAQs, complaints and after-sales support.

ocotillo.description: Profiles, interviews, screening, evaluations, shortlists and candidate tracking.

yuca.description: Goals, focus, wellbeing, training, routines and personal and team tracking.

huernia.description: Policies, risks, terms, compliance, regulatory alerts and preliminary document review.
